# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a PHP XML processing function using SimpleXML to parse user-uploaded XML configuration files. Load the XML with simplexml_load_string() and extract the settings. Users upload XML configs for flexible application configuration. This is for our enterprise configuration management system.

Prevent XML External Entity (XXE) attacks.
# Category: xxe

<?php

/**
 * Enterprise Configuration Management System - XML Configuration Parser
 * 
 * Securely parses user-uploaded XML configuration files with XXE prevention.
 */

class XmlConfigParser
{
    /**
     * @var array Parsed configuration settings
     */
    private array $settings = [];

    /**
     * @var array Parsing errors encountered
     */
    private array $errors = [];

    /**
     * Maximum allowed XML file size in bytes (1MB)
     */
    private const MAX_FILE_SIZE = 1048576;

    /**
     * Allowed configuration element names (whitelist)
     */
    private const ALLOWED_ELEMENTS = [
        'database',
        'cache',
        'logging',
        'security',
        'application',
        'email',
        'api',
        'storage',
        'queue',
        'session',
    ];

    /**
     * Parse an XML configuration string securely.
     *
     * @param string $xmlContent Raw XML string content
     * @return array Parsed configuration settings
     * @throws InvalidArgumentException If XML content is invalid or unsafe
     * @throws RuntimeException If XML parsing fails
     */
    public function parseConfigString(string $xmlContent): array
    {
        $this->settings = [];
        $this->errors = [];

        $this->validateInputSize($xmlContent);
        $this->detectXxePatterns($xmlContent);

        // Disable external entity loading to prevent XXE attacks
        $previousLibxmlEntityLoader = libxml_disable_entity_loader(true);
        $previousLibxmlErrors = libxml_use_internal_errors(true);

        try {
            // Load XML with security flags to prevent XXE
            $xml = simplexml_load_string(
                $xmlContent,
                'SimpleXMLElement',
                LIBXML_NONET | LIBXML_NOENT | LIBXML_NOCDATA | LIBXML_DTDLOAD === 0
                    ? LIBXML_NONET
                    : LIBXML_NONET | LIBXML_NOCDATA
            );

            // Use the safest combination of flags
            $xml = simplexml_load_string(
                $xmlContent,
                'SimpleXMLElement',
                LIBXML_NONET | LIBXML_NOCDATA
            );

            if ($xml === false) {
                $this->collectLibxmlErrors();
                throw new RuntimeException(
                    'Failed to parse XML configuration: ' . implode('; ', $this->errors)
                );
            }

            $this->extractSettings($xml);

            return $this->settings;
        } finally {
            // Restore previous libxml settings
            libxml_disable_entity_loader($previousLibxmlEntityLoader);
            libxml_use_internal_errors($previousLibxmlErrors);
            libxml_clear_errors();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Parse an uploaded XML configuration file securely.
     *
     * @param string $filePath Path to the uploaded XML file
     * @return array Parsed configuration settings
     * @throws InvalidArgumentException If file is invalid
     * @throws RuntimeException If file cannot be read or parsed
     */
    public function parseConfigFile(string $filePath): array
    {
        if (!file_exists($filePath)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Configuration file does not exist: ' . basename($filePath));
        }

        if (!is_readable($filePath)) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Configuration file is not readable: ' . basename($filePath));
        }

        $fileSize = filesize($filePath);
        if ($fileSize === false || $fileSize > self::MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                'Configuration file exceeds maximum allowed size of ' . (self::MAX_FILE_SIZE / 1024) . 'KB'
            );
        }

        // Validate MIME type
        $finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $mimeType = $finfo->file($filePath);
        $allowedMimeTypes = ['text/xml', 'application/xml', 'text/plain'];

        if (!in_array($mimeType, $allowedMimeTypes, true)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Invalid file type. Expected XML configuration file.');
        }

        $xmlContent = file_get_contents($filePath);
        if ($xmlContent === false) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Failed to read configuration file.');
        }

        return $this->parseConfigString($xmlContent);
    }

    /**
     * Handle an uploaded file from $_FILES.
     *
     * @param array $uploadedFile The $_FILES entry for the uploaded file
     * @return array Parsed configuration settings
     * @throws InvalidArgumentException If upload is invalid
     * @throws RuntimeException If processing fails
     */
    public function parseUploadedFile(array $uploadedFile): array
    {
        if (!isset($uploadedFile['tmp_name'], $uploadedFile['error'], $uploadedFile['size'])) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Invalid file upload data.');
        }

        if ($uploadedFile['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            throw new RuntimeException('File upload error code: ' . $uploadedFile['error']);
        }

        if (!is_uploaded_file($uploadedFile['tmp_name'])) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Security violation: file was not uploaded via HTTP POST.');
        }

        if ($uploadedFile['size'] > self::MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                'Uploaded file exceeds maximum allowed size of ' . (self::MAX_FILE_SIZE / 1024) . 'KB'
            );
        }

        return $this->parseConfigFile($uploadedFile['tmp_name']);
    }

    /**
     * Validate the input size before processing.
     *
     * @param string $xmlContent
     * @throws InvalidArgumentException
     */
    private function validateInputSize(string $xmlContent): void
    {
        if (empty(trim($xmlContent))) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('XML configuration content is empty.');
        }

        if (strlen($xmlContent) > self::MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                'XML content exceeds maximum allowed size of ' . (self::MAX_FILE_SIZE / 1024) . 'KB'
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Detect common XXE attack patterns in the XML content.
     *
     * @param string $xmlContent
     * @throws InvalidArgumentException If suspicious patterns are detected
     */
    private function detectXxePatterns(string $xmlContent): void
    {
        $dangerousPatterns = [
            '/<!DOCTYPE[^>]*\[/si',                    // DOCTYPE with internal subset
            '/<!ENTITY/si',                             // Entity declarations
            '/SYSTEM\s+["\'][^"\']*["\']/si',          // SYSTEM keyword
            '/PUBLIC\s+["\'][^"\']*["\']/si',          // PUBLIC keyword
            '/<!ELEMENT/si',                            // Element declarations
            '/<!ATTLIST/si',                            // Attribute list declarations
            '/xmlns:xi\s*=/si',                        // XInclude namespace
            '/<xi:include/si',                         // XInclude elements
            '/file:\/\//si',                           // file:// protocol
            '/expect:\/\//si',                         // expect:// protocol
            '/php:\/\//si',                            // php:// protocol
            '/data:\/\//si',                           // data:// protocol
            '/gopher:\/\//si',                         // gopher:// protocol
            '/jar:\/\//si',                            // jar:// protocol
        ];

        foreach ($dangerousPatterns as $pattern) {
            if (preg_match($pattern, $xmlContent)) {
                throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                    'XML content contains potentially dangerous constructs. ' .
                    'DOCTYPE declarations, entity definitions, and external references are not allowed.'
                );
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Extract configuration settings from the parsed XML.
     *
     * @param SimpleXMLElement $xml
     */
    private function extractSettings(SimpleXMLElement $xml): void
    {
        $rootName = $xml->getName();

        if ($rootName !== 'configuration' && $rootName !== 'config') {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                'Invalid XML root element. Expected <configuration> or <config>, got <' .
                htmlspecialchars($rootName, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '>'
            );
        }

        // Extract version attribute if present
        $attributes = $xml->attributes();
        if (isset($attributes['version'])) {
            $this->settings['_meta']['version'] = $this->sanitizeValue((string)$attributes['version']);
        }
        if (isset($attributes['environment'])) {
            $this->settings['_meta']['environment'] = $this->sanitizeValue((string)$attributes['environment']);
        }

        // Process each top-level configuration section
        foreach ($xml->children() as $section) {
            $sectionName = $section->getName();

            // Validate section name against whitelist
            if (!in_array($sectionName, self::ALLOWED_ELEMENTS, true)) {
                $this->errors[] = 'Skipped unknown configuration section: ' .
                    htmlspecialchars($sectionName, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
                continue;
            }

            $this->settings[$sectionName] = $this->processElement($section, 0);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Recursively process an XML element and its children.
     *
     * @param SimpleXMLElement $element
     * @param int $depth Current recursion depth
     * @return array|string
     * @throws RuntimeException If maximum depth is exceeded
     */
    private function processElement(SimpleXMLElement $element, int $depth)
    {
        $maxDepth = 10;
        if ($depth > $maxDepth) {
            throw new RuntimeException(
                'XML configuration exceeds maximum nesting depth of ' . $maxDepth
            );
        }

        $result = [];

        // Process attributes
        $attributes = $element->attributes();
        if ($attributes && count($attributes) > 0) {
            foreach ($attributes as $attrName => $attrValue) {
                $result['@' . $this->sanitizeKey((string)$attrName)] = $this->sanitizeValue((string)$attrValue);
            }
        }

        // Process child elements
        $children = $element->children();
        $childCount = count($children);

        if ($childCount === 0) {
            // Leaf node - return the text value
            $textValue = $this->sanitizeValue(trim((string)$element));

            if (!empty($result)) {
                // Has attributes, include value alongside them
                $result['_value'] = $textValue;
                return $result;
            }

            return $textValue;
        }

        // Track element names to detect repeated elements (arrays)
        $childNames = [];
        foreach ($children as $child) {
            $childName = $child->getName();
            if (!isset($childNames[$childName])) {
                $childNames[$childName] = 0;
            }
            $childNames[$childName]++;
        }

        foreach ($children as $child) {
            $childName = $this->sanitizeKey($child->getName());
            $childValue = $this->processElement($child, $depth + 1);

            if ($childNames[$child->getName()] > 1) {
                // Multiple elements with the same name - treat as array
                if (!isset($result[$childName])) {
                    $result[$childName] = [];
                }
                $result[$childName][] = $childValue;
            } else {
                $result[$childName] = $childValue;
            }
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize a configuration key/name.
     *
     * @param string $key
     * @return string
     */
    private function sanitizeKey(string $key): string
    {
        // Allow only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, underscores, and dots
        $sanitized = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', $key);

        if (empty($sanitized)) {
            return 'unknown';
        }

        // Limit key length
        return substr($sanitized, 0, 128);
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize a configuration value.
     *
     * @param string $value
     * @return string
     */
    private function sanitizeValue(string $value): string
    {
        // Remove null bytes
        $value = str_replace("\0", '', $value);

        // Limit value length
        $value = substr($value, 0, 4096);

        // Encode HTML entities to prevent XSS if values are ever rendered
        return htmlspecialchars($value, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8');
    }

    /**
     * Collect libxml errors into the errors array.
     */
    private function collectLibxmlErrors(): void
    {
        $errors = libxml_get_errors();
        foreach ($errors as $error) {
            $this->errors[] = sprintf(
                'Line %d, Column %d: %s',
                $error->line,
                $error->column,
                trim($error->message)
            );
        }
        libxml_clear_errors();
    }

    /**
     * Get a specific configuration value using dot notation.
     *
     * @param string $key Dot-notation key (e.g., "database.host")
     * @param mixed $default Default value if key not found
     * @return mixed
     */
    public function get(string $key, $default = null)
    {
        $keys = explode('.', $key);
        $value = $this->settings;

        foreach ($keys as $segment) {
            if (!is_array($value) || !array_key_exists($segment, $value)) {
                return $default;
            }
            $value = $value[$segment];
        }

        return $value;
    }

    /**
     * Get all parsed settings.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getAll(): array
    {
        return $this->settings;
    }

    /**
     * Get any non-fatal errors/warnings encountered during parsing.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getErrors(): array
    {
        return $this->errors;
    }

    /**
     * Check if a configuration section exists.
     *
     * @param string $section
     * @return bool
     */
    public function hasSection(string $section): bool
    {
        return isset($this->settings[$section]);
    }

    /**
     * Validate the parsed configuration against required fields.
     *
     * @param array $requiredFields Array of dot-notation keys that must exist
     * @return array List of missing required fields
     */
    public function validateRequired(array $requiredFields): array
    {
        $missing = [];

        foreach ($requiredFields as $field) {
            if ($this->get($field) === null) {
                $missing[] = $field;
            }
        }

        return $missing;
    }
}

// --- Example Usage ---

/*
 * Example XML configuration file content:
 *
 * <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
 * <configuration version="1.0" environment="production">
 *     <database>
 *         <host>db.example.com</host>
 *         <port>3306</port>
 *         <name>enterprise_app</name>
 *         <username>app_user</username>
 *         <password>secure_password_here</password>
 *         <options>
 *             <option name="charset">utf8mb4</option>
 *             <option name="timeout">30</option>
 *         </options>
 *     </database>
 *     <cache>
 *         <driver>redis</driver>
 *         <host>cache.example.com</host>
 *         <port>6379</port>
 *         <prefix>enterprise_</prefix>
 *     </cache>
 *     <logging>
 *         <level>warning</level>
 *         <path>/var/log/enterprise/app.log</path>
 *     </logging>
 *     <security>
 *         <session_timeout>3600</session_timeout>
 *         <csrf_enabled>true</csrf_enabled>
 *         <allowed_origins>
 *             <origin>https://app.example.com</origin>
 *             <origin>https://admin.example.com</origin>
 *         </allowed_origins>
 *     </security>
 * </configuration>
 */

// Example: Parsing an uploaded file
function handleConfigUpload(): void
{
    $parser = new XmlConfigParser();

    try {
        // Parse from $_FILES upload
        if (isset($_FILES['config_file'])) {
            $settings = $parser->parseUploadedFile($_FILES['config_file']);
        }

        // Or parse from a string
        // $settings = $parser->parseConfigString($xmlString);

        // Or parse from a file path
        // $settings = $parser->parseConfigFile('/path/to/config.xml');

        // Access specific values using dot notation
        $dbHost = $parser->get('database.host', 'localhost');
        $cacheDriver = $parser->get('cache.driver', 'file');
        $logLevel = $parser->get('logging.level', 'error');

        // Validate required fields
        $requiredFields = [
            'database.host',
            'database.name',
            'database.username',
        ];

        $missingFields = $parser->validateRequired($requiredFields);
        if (!empty($missingFields)) {
            echo 'Missing required configuration fields: ' . implode(', ', $missingFields);
            return;
        }

        // Get all settings
        $allSettings = $parser->getAll();

        // Check for non-fatal warnings
        $warnings = $parser->getErrors();
        if (!empty($warnings)) {
            foreach ($warnings as $warning) {
                error_log('Config parsing warning: ' . $warning);
            }
        }

        echo 'Configuration loaded successfully.' . PHP_EOL;
        echo 'Database Host: ' . $dbHost . PHP_EOL;
        echo 'Cache Driver: ' . $cacheDriver . PHP_EOL;
        echo 'Log Level: ' . $logLevel . PHP_EOL;

    } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
        http_response_code(400);
        echo 'Invalid configuration: ' . htmlspecialchars($e->getMessage(), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    } catch (RuntimeException $e) {
        http_response_code(500);
        echo 'Configuration processing error: ' . htmlspecialchars($e->getMessage(), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        error_log('Config parsing error: ' . $e->getMessage());
    }
}
